purpose: Filter-coffee recommendation rules for grind adjustment first, then one optional non-grind advisory.

messages.balanced: Your brew seems balanced. Keep this setting as your reference point.
messages.mixed: This sounds like uneven extraction more than a simple grind-size issue.
messages.mixed_secondary: Keep grind the same for one more brew. Reduce or standardize agitation, pour more evenly, and watch for stalled drawdown.
messages.fallback: Not enough signal for a confident recommendation yet. Rebrew with the same recipe, re-photograph, and add taste notes plus drawdown time.
